description: Style Note A formal essential for the impeccably dressed cosmo male -a classic   tie. provogue perfects this traditional accessory's foray into corporate culture with this range of beautifully toned ties. Match your cufflinks to your tie and make sure your shirt is a milder tone of your tie's hue. Product Details Bluish purple diagonal striping Pink tie with a loop at the back Material and Care Microfibre Dry clean only Size Length: 148 cm
